salientSummary: Repo sidebar wired: @Observable RepoSidebarModel aggregates RepoScanner + PersistenceStore; RepoSidebarView renders grouped Pinned + per-root Sections with context-menu pin/unpin/Show-in-Finder/Copy-path and a refresh toolbar button; EmptyRepoList ContentUnavailableView routes the 'Add folder…' action through openSettings; KiteApp injects both stores into the window. 8 new ViewModel tests + 5 new snapshot tests + 5 new XCUITests (authored only). Full KiteTests suite now 95 tests green (90 Swift Testing + 5 XCTest snapshot). swift-snapshot-testing 1.17+ added to KiteTests target only. VAL-REPO-007/008/009 and VAL-UI-007/010 fulfilled.
whatWasImplemented: Added Sources/ViewModels/RepoSidebarModel.swift — @Observable @MainActor model wrapping RepoScanner + PersistenceStore with discoveredByRoot (OrderedRepoGroups preserving root insertion order), pinned (filtered to live on-disk matches), selectedRepo (round-tripped through persistence.lastOpenedRepo), isScanning, plus refresh/select/pin/unpin/restoreLastSelection. Scanner is injectable via a @Sendable closure for tests; rootsOverride seam feeds the XCUITest fixture-roots launch arg. Default root is ~/Developer; extra roots from settings append, deduped by standardizedFileURL. Added Sources/Views/Sidebar/RepoSidebarView.swift — NavigationSplitView leftmost column with List(selection:), a Pinned section above per-root sections, context menu (Pin/Unpin toggle, Show in Finder via NSWorkspace, Copy path via NSPasteboard), .navigationSplitViewColumnWidth(200/260/400), .navigationTitle('Kite'), refresh toolbar button, .task { refresh; restoreLastSelection }. Added Sources/Views/Sidebar/RepoRow.swift — folder.fill for work-tree / cylinder for bare, two-line text (displayName + home-relative parent path), 'bare' pill badge, accessibility identifiers RepoSidebar.Row.<name>. Added Sources/Views/Sidebar/EmptyRepoList.swift — ContentUnavailableView wired to @Environment(\.openSettings). Updated Sources/Views/RootView.swift to render RepoSidebarView in the sidebar column. Updated Sources/App/KiteApp.swift to own a PersistenceStore + RepoSidebarModel via @State, inject both via .environment(), and honor -KITE_FIXTURE_ROOTS launch arg for XCUITest. Edited project.yml to add pointfreeco/swift-snapshot-testing (from: 1.17.0) attached to KiteTests only; removed the deferral note. Package.resolved remains gitignored. Added accessibility identifiers: RepoSidebar.List, RepoSidebar.EmptyState, RepoSidebar.EmptyState.AddFolderButton, RepoSidebar.PinnedSection, RepoSidebar.RootSection.<name>, RepoSidebar.Row.<name>, RepoSidebar.RefreshButton.
whatWasLeftUndone: XCUITest file Tests/KiteUITests/RepoSidebarUITests.swift is authored but NOT run — macOS TCC blocks XCUITest harness attachment in this environment (explicit direction from the feature brief). Must be re-run by a human on a host with Accessibility + Automation prompts accepted. Snapshot reference PNGs were auto-generated and committed, but need human eyeball before final sign-off (see discoveredIssues below).

commandsRun.observation: Project regenerated with SnapshotTesting package dependency attached to KiteTests target only.
BUILD SUCCEEDED after resolving SPM package; no warnings.
95 tests green: 90 Swift Testing cases across 13 suites + 5 XCTest snapshot cases. Previous 82 still green; 8 new RepoSidebarModel cases + 5 new RepoSidebarSnapshotTests cases added.

interactiveChecks.action: Viewed generated snapshot PNGs (EmptyState light/dark, RepoRow workTree/bare/dark) via Read tool
interactiveChecks.observed: Empty state renders 'No repositories / Kite didn't find any git repositories in ~/Developer. Add another folder in Settings to look elsewhere.' with a prominent 'Add folder…' button; RepoRow work-tree variant shows a blue folder.fill icon + 'alpha' + '/Users/tester/Developer'; RepoRow bare variant shows the cylinder glyph + 'server.git' + 'bare' pill. Dark-mode snapshots record cleanly but render near-identical to light mode because the host NSView has a transparent background; parity against List(.sidebar) vibrant background is a visual-review item for the human pass.

discoveredIssues.description: Snapshot reference PNGs were auto-recorded on first test run and committed alongside the tests. They pass on re-run (deterministic), but have NOT been visually reviewed by a human. Before final milestone sign-off, someone with a display should open Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/__Snapshots__/RepoSidebarSnapshotTests/*.png and confirm the empty state, RepoRow.workTree, RepoRow.bare, and dark-mode variants look correct. The dark-mode variants in particular render against a transparent NSHostingController background so they look nearly identical to light mode in the current snapshots — once the sidebar is viewed in-app against the vibrant List(.sidebar) backdrop the dark-mode parity is expected to look right, but a follow-up snapshot revision that embeds each RepoRow in a representative container background would make the dark-mode assertion stronger.

Tests/KiteUITests/RepoSidebarUITests.swift is authored but was NOT executed: macOS TCC blocks XCUITest harness attachment on this host. The 5 cases fulfill the end-to-end verification plane for VAL-REPO-007/008/009 and VAL-UI-007. A human with Accessibility + Automation permissions granted should run `xcodebuild test -scheme Kite -only-testing:KiteUITests/RepoSidebarUITests` to confirm.

Because M2-settings-roots hasn't landed yet, pressing 'Add folder…' in the empty state opens the placeholder Settings scene showing only 'Settings (populated in M2-settings-roots)'. Per the feature brief this is acceptable; the next feature will populate the Roots tab and the action will become end-to-end functional.
